name: Entry Point Bundle Composition
description: How bundle.md composes amplifier-foundation and amplifier-expert behavior into the ecosystem's front door, and how the @-mention resolution chain assembles capabilities from distributed repositories into a unified entry point

name: Expert Agent Knowledge Architecture
description: How the amplifier-expert agent organizes ecosystem knowledge across a 4-tier @-mention hierarchy spanning multiple repositories, implements three operating modes (RESEARCH/GUIDE/VALIDATE), and routes to specialist agents — this is the ecosystem's primary knowledge distribution mechanism

name: Recipe Orchestration Patterns
description: What patterns emerge across the 6 recipes (590-3021 lines each, 9467 total) including multi-stage workflows, approval gates, sub-recipe composition, context variable passing, and the relationship between generic recipes and ecosystem-specific ones

name: Ecosystem Governance Model
description: How REPOSITORY_RULES.md defines dependency-based awareness rules, MODULES.md catalogs the full component ecosystem, and development-hygiene.md governs installation architecture — together these form the architectural contract binding 40+ repositories into a coherent system
